authors.author: Martin Smith
Martin Smith
Herr, hier ist mein Herz (ich streck mich aus nach dir)

verse.name: v1
verse.lines: Lord You have my heart and I will search for yours Jesus take my life and lead me on. Oh Lord You have my heart and I will search for yours Let me be to you a sacrifice

verse.name: v2
verse.lines: And I will praise You Lord And I will sing of love come down And as You show Your face We'll see your glory here
